Fortran modules

This page is a high-level map of the Fortran modules. API-level documentation can be added later with Sphinx Fortran extensions, FORD, or Doxygen-based tooling.

Configuration

  • mod_config

  • mod_readConditions

Core

  • mod_constants

  • mod_utils

  • mod_RNG

  • mod_intro

  • mod_part_info

  • mod_debug_checks

  • mod_state

Fields

  • mod_fields

  • mod_density

  • mod_charge_weights

  • mod_chargeDeposition

  • mod_PoissonDecomposition

  • mod_PoissonSolver_legacy

  • mod_electricField

  • mod_magneticField

Geometry

  • mod_domain

  • mod_boundary

  • mod_generateBoundary

Particles

  • mod_particles

  • mod_particle_loader

  • mod_load_particles_legacy

  • mod_particleMover

  • mod_particleBC

  • mod_particle_sorting

  • mod_collisions

  • mod_reactions

  • mod_reactionsDB

  • mod_heating

  • mod_planeMoments

  • mod_chemistryState

  • mod_legacy_particle_globals

Simulation

  • mod_simParams

  • mod_simulation

I/O

  • mod_output_2d
